_comment: Same idea as config/column_map.json, but for the Physician Fee Schedule (MPFS) National Payment Amount File. Add new header spellings here (not in code) if a future CMS file uses one not listed yet.

_fallback_positional_map._comment: Used ONLY if a file has no header row at all. Fill these in with 0-based column indexes after inspecting one real downloaded MPFS file with --inspect. Leave -1 for fields that don't apply.
